message.content:
Migrate Tailwind CSS from CDN to build-time in the CitedBy.ai project at C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3.

Current state:
- `index.html` uses `<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>` with inline config and custom CSS
- `tailwind.config.ts` is already correctly configured with content paths pointing to pages/, components/, etc.
- `postcss.config.cjs` already has tailwindcss + autoprefixer plugins
- tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer are already in devDependencies

Steps to perform:

1. **Create `globals.css`** at the root level with:
```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;
```
Then add ALL the custom CSS currently in index.html's `<style>` block (btn-gradient, gradient-text, ninja-card, custom-scrollbar, global scrollbar styles, animations: fade-in, zoom-in, slide-in-from-bottom, slide-in-from-right, animate-in, animate-slide-up, animate-slide-right, skeleton-shimmer, scroll-progress, animate-fade-up). Copy them EXACTLY as they are.

2. **Modify `index.tsx`** to import the CSS:
Add `import './globals.css';` as the first import (before React).

3. **Modify `index.html`**:
- REMOVE the `<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>` line
- REMOVE the inline `<script>tailwind.config = {...}</script>` block  
- REMOVE the entire `<style>...</style>` block (since it's moved to globals.css)
- KEEP the Google Fonts links, meta tags, title, body, and script module entry point

The final index.html should be clean HTML with just: doctype, html lang/class, head (meta, title, fonts), body with root div and module script.

4. **Verify** that tailwind.config.ts has the `primary` color and font families matching what was in the inline script config:
```js
colors: { primary: '#7c3aed' }
fontFamily: { sans: ['Inter', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif'], serif: ['Playfair Display', 'Georgia', 'serif'] }
```

Write all files. Do NOT run build (that will be done separately).

content.text: I'll start by reading the current files to understand the exact content that needs to be migrated.

content.text:
All files are written correctly. Let me also confirm the `tailwind.config.ts` already has the matching configuration (already read above, but summarizing the verification).

Here is a summary of all changes made:

---

## Migration Complete: Tailwind CSS from CDN to Build-Time

### Files Modified

**1. Created: `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\globals.css`**

New file containing:
- The three Tailwind directives (`@tailwind base`, `@tailwind components`, `@tailwind utilities`)
- All custom CSS extracted verbatim from the `<style>` block in `index.html`:
  - `.btn-gradient` and hover state
  - `.gradient-text`
  - `.ninja-card` and hover state
  - `.custom-scrollbar` webkit scrollbar styles
  - Global dark scrollbar styles (`*`, `::-webkit-scrollbar`, etc.)
  - All `@keyframes` animations: `fade-in`, `zoom-in`, `slide-in-from-bottom`, `slide-in-from-right`, `shimmer`, `fade-up-in`
  - All animation utility classes: `.animate-in`, `.animate-slide-up`, `.animate-slide-right`, `.skeleton-shimmer`, `.animate-fade-up`
  - `#scroll-progress` styles

**2. Modified: `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\index.tsx`**

Added `import './globals.css';` as the very first line, before the React import. This ensures the CSS is processed by the Vite/PostCSS pipeline, which will run it through the `tailwindcss` and `autoprefixer` plugins defined in `postcss.config.cjs`.

**3. Modified: `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\index.html`**

Removed three blocks:
- The `<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>` CDN script (was line 11)
- The inline `<script>tailwind.config = {...}</script>` configuration block (was lines 12-27)
- The entire `<style>...</style>` block (was lines 28-98)

Kept intact:
- DOCTYPE, `<html lang="fr" class="dark">`
- All `<meta>` tags (charset, viewport, description)
- `<title>`
- Google Fonts `<link>` tags (preconnect + stylesheet)
- `<body>` with `bg-black text-gray-100` classes
- `#scroll-progress` div
- `#root` div
- Module script entry point (`/index.tsx`)

**4. Verified: `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\tailwind.config.ts`** (no changes needed)

Already contains the matching configuration:
- `darkMode: ["class"]`
- `colors: { primary: "#7c3aed" }`
- `fontFamily: { sans: ["Inter", "system-ui", "sans-serif"], serif: ["Playfair Display", "Georgia", "serif"] }`
- `content` paths covering `index.html`, `App.tsx`, `index.tsx`, `pages/`, `components/`, `lib/`, `i18n/`

**5. Verified: `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\postcss.config.cjs`** (no changes needed)

Already configured with `tailwindcss` and `autoprefixer` plugins.

---

The build pipeline is now: `globals.css` is imported by `index.tsx` -> Vite processes it through PostCSS -> `tailwindcss` plugin scans all content paths and generates only the utility classes actually used -> `autoprefixer` adds vendor prefixes -> output is a single optimized CSS bundle. No more runtime CDN dependency.
